nasb.text: ‘On that day,’ declares the Lord of hosts, ‘I will take you, Zerubbabel, son of Shealtiel, My servant,’ declares the Lord, ‘and I will make you like a signet ring, for I have chosen you,’ ” declares the Lord of hosts.

esv.text: On that day, declares the Lord of hosts, I will take you, O Zerubbabel my servant, the son of Shealtiel, declares the Lord, and make you like a signet ring, for I have chosen you, declares the Lord of hosts.”

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華說：‘撒拉鐵的兒子，我的僕人所羅巴伯啊！到那日我必提拔你。’耶和華說：‘我必以你為印記。’萬軍之耶和華說：‘因為我揀選了你。’”

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华说，我的仆人撒拉铁的儿子所罗巴伯啊，到那日，我必使你像我盖印的戒指，因为我拣选了你。这是万军之耶和华说的。’”
